source: Froedtert & Medical College of Wisconsin Cancer Network

news.title: Medical College of Wisconsin Announces New President and CEO
news.summary_en: The Medical College of Wisconsin (MCW) today announced that Shekar N. Kurpad, MD, PhD, FEL ‘01, has been unanimously appointed as the institution’s seventh president and chief executive officer (CEO), effective July 1, 2026.
news.original_title: Medical College of Wisconsin Announces New President and CEO
news.summary_cn: The Medical College of Wisconsin (MCW) today announced that Shekar N. Kurpad, MD, PhD, FEL ‘01, has been unanimously appointed as the institution’s seventh president and chief executive officer (CEO), effective July 1, 2026.
